evidence_summary.detail: Contusion Of Liver: ROR=93.8885393258427, lower_CI=12.120165955547613, cases=1.0
Computerised Tomogram Liver Abnormal: ROR=73.76954735152488, lower_CI=9.699439311861475, cases=1.0
Tachycardia Induced Cardiomyopathy: ROR=169.120338220743, lower_CI=83.56306172992794, cases=9.0
Cardiac Arrest Neonatal: ROR=67.96970761811461, lower_CI=27.49373584582608, cases=5.0
His Bundle (Junctional Ectopic) Tachycardia: ROR=217.48458720979755, lower_CI=73.9754473374265, cases=4.0
Electrocardiogram T Wave Alternans: ROR=295.1048954641188, lower_CI=61.2966252699651, cases=2.0

attribution_explanations.attribution_explanation: Hepatobiliary disorders attribution is driven mainly by Drug-induced liver injury (DILI_t) prediction positive. The explanation is constrained to retrieved tool_results and evidence_items.

molecular_attribution.mechanistic_role: Computational model predicts direct hepatotoxicity liability
molecular_attribution.limitations: admetSAR3 model probability contribution 0.06; limited by model applicability domain.

attribution_limitations: Live LLM returned a bare driver object; local code wrapped it as molecular_attribution.
No explicit SMARTS-level toxicophore match was available.
No GNN attention attribution was available in Stage 1 tool_results.
No SHAP atom/feature attribution was available in Stage 1 tool_results.

attribution_explanations.attribution_explanation: Cardiac disorders attribution is driven mainly by hERG inhibition (all concentration thresholds positive). The explanation is constrained to retrieved tool_results and evidence_items.

molecular_attribution.mechanistic_role: Blockade of the hERG potassium channel prolongs cardiac repolarization, increasing risk of QT prolongation and life-threatening arrhythmias.

evidence_refs.summary: label_hERG_1_10=1, label_hERG_1=1, label_hERG_10=1, label_hERG_10_30=1, label_hERG_30=1 - all positive for hERG inhibition.

molecular_attribution.limitations: In silico predictions; not direct electrophysiology data.

attribution_limitations: Live LLM returned a bare driver object; local code wrapped it as molecular_attribution.
No explicit SMARTS-level toxicophore match was available.
No GNN attention attribution was available in Stage 1 tool_results.
No SHAP atom/feature attribution was available in Stage 1 tool_results.

risk_judgement.judgement: Baseline probability is supported by label_DILI_t positive; label_Mito_t positive; PersADE high ROR signal; Direct DTA support via ERN1; Direct DTA support via ABCB11.
uncertainty_drivers: No explicit SMARTS-level toxicophore match was available.
No GNN attention attribution was available in Stage 1 tool_results.
